MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney James Barringer to appear on April 30, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he has not responded to the issue raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with regard to notice. The Petition to Establish Estate's Claim of Ownership to Property, etc. was also continued to that date.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for Mary Hale.

Mr. Barringer stated that the matter has been in the hands of the Probate Referee for three or four weeks now and he is waiting for him to complete his work. The matter was continued to April 27, 2009.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for Mary Hale.

Mr. Barringer stated that he had received the signed Inventory and that it had been sent to the Probate Referee. The matter was continued to March 30, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the filing of the Inventory and Appraisal.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for Mary Hale (Administrator).

Mr. Barringer stated that there had been some communication issues with his client which may have been due health issues, that it was his understanding that the documentation was on its way back to him in the mail, and that additional time was needed. The matter was continued to March 2, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. McDaniels.
